--- Main Page ---
The Lost Druid Brewery, Distillery & Gastropub | Top 3 Atlanta's Best Breweries 2022 | Located in Avondale
Estates, GA - America's Best Small Town Beer Scene | A Modern Brewstillery
The Lost Druid
Named Atlanta's Best New Brewery
2020 (Atlanta Magazine)
Named Top 3 Brewery in Atlanta 2022 (Access Atlanta)
Voted Best Brewery/Brewpub 2025 (Decaturish)
Avondale
Estates, GA
Voted America's Best Small
Town Beer Scene 2021, 2022, 2023 & 2025! (USA Today)

Craft Beers
The Lost Druid
Craft Beers
Most beers available in both short and full pours on draft, as well as 4pk-16oz cans (availability may vary).
We'll happily provide a few samples before you make your selection.

Our hard seltzers are
GLUTEN-FREE
with
100%
natural flavors
and
no artificial colors
. They may be available in both short
and full pours on draft, as well as 4pk-16oz cans. We'll happily provide a few samples before you make your
selection. Not all hard seltzers available in full pours or cans. Can availability subject to change.

The Lost Druid
PREMIUM Craft Spirits
The Lost Druid
PREMIUM Craft Spirits
We offer a limited number of premium craft spirits, available in to-go bottles and as neat/on-the-rocks pours.
These spirits are also available in our cocktails, in addition to our house bourbon, gin, rum and vodka.
Last updated 2026/02/23.

The Lost Druid
Craft Cocktails
The Lost Druid
Craft Cocktails
Our cocktails feature craft-made syrups, real fruit juices, bitters and paired garnishes. Most are available
with our own
FAUX Non-Alcoholic Spirits
as well as our premium
BLACK BOURBURANA BOURBON, DZL SKUNK VODKA, KING LOUIE GIN, KUSH ISLAND RUM and SPICED RUMBURANA RUM. We
only offer the cocktails/drinks listed. We do not offer a full bar, and
we do not offer shots
.
Last updated 2026/02/23.
NOTE:
